title: myosotis palustris var. sylvatica
intro: Myosotis palustris var. sylvatica, also known as woodland forget-me-not, is a flowering plant that belongs to the borage family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, the plant has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of M. palustris var. sylvatica include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system, with potential applications in treating conditions such as bronchitis and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
